output.summary: Fixed all 4 QA issues: added id to BaseControl in TSX, added @var docblock for auto-extracted attributes in PHP, separated computed helpers from attribute declarations, and aligned variable documentation with block.json attributes.

issuesFixed.description: BaseControl component has label but missing id property
issuesFixed.fix: Added id="video-url-control" to BaseControl at line 319 of ContentWithMedia.tsx

issuesFixed.description: PHP template variable documentation pattern not followed
issuesFixed.fix: Added comprehensive @var docblock listing all 15 auto-extracted attribute variables from block.json. Variables were already auto-extracted by the theme's extract() in inc/helpers/blocks.php - the issue was lack of documentation, not manual extraction.

issuesFixed.description: Computed helper variables mixed with attribute documentation area
issuesFixed.fix: Separated computed helper variables ($hasImageMedia, $hasVideo, $hasMedia) below the @var docblock with a clear '// Computed helper variables.' comment. Aligned assignment operators for readability.

issuesFixed.description: Missing @var docblock for auto-extracted camelCase attribute variables
issuesFixed.fix: Added full @var docblock covering all 15 attributes: $anchor, $isReversed, $reverseRows, $darkMode, $eyebrow, $heading, $description, $buttons, $mediaType, $imageLayout, $images, $videoSource, $videoFile, $videoId, $posterImage. Also documented $block (WP_Block instance).

buildStatus.notes: Build compiles with only pre-existing performance warnings (asset size limits)

lintStatus.notes: All 4 warnings are pre-existing: 3 experimental WP API warnings and 1 React Hook dependency warning. The @wordpress/no-base-control-with-label-without-id error is now resolved.

syncStatus.notes: PHP and TSX remain in sync. PHP docblock now accurately reflects block.json attributes. No markup changes were needed - only documentation and the TSX id property.
